title: NoBabyVillagers
description: Simple Minecraft plugin to control villager breeding on Minecraft 1.20+
body:
# Villager Plugin

Simple Minecraft plugin to control villager breeding on Minecraft 1.20+

## Installation

1. Download the `villager-1.0.0.jar` from releases
2. Place it in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Restart your server

## Configuration

Edit `plugins/Villager/config.yml`:

```yaml
villager-breeding-disabled: false
```

Set to `true` to disable villager breeding completely.

## Usage

- When disabled, villagers cannot breed and produce baby villagers
- Use `/reload` command to apply config changes

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20+
- Spigot/Paper server

## Author

melut
